description.ko: 심해의 자정대에서 펼쳐지는 투명하고 빛나는 해파리들의 평화로운 춤.
description.en: A peaceful dance of translucent, glowing jellyfish in the midnight zone of the ocean.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean floor, titled 'The Bioluminescent Current.' A swarm of #40E0D0 turquoise jellyfish with long, translucent #48D1CC cyan filaments pulsate in rhythmic unison. The #000080 midnight water is thick with shimmering marine snow. In the background, ancient #006994 mineral vents release bubbles that glow with thermal light. Photorealistic fluid dynamics, 8k resolution.
